node.text: John believes nature helps in calming us down and acts like a reset button amidst chaos.
John has been camping plenty of times and enjoys getting away from it all to be at one with nature.
John cherishes memories of his pet Max, including a camping trip where they hiked, swam, and made great memories.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "camping trip with Max") on Observation 1 (Score: 1.00)

node.text: John found the camping trip with his pet Max to be peaceful and awesome.
